programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: After crashing and ditching a limo, a suspect bolts into a dense, unforgiving stretch of woods and refuses to surrender. Can K9 Chase bring the standoff to an end? When a man threatens to harm himself, officers turn to a less-lethal option, K9 Milo, to safely bring the volatile situation under control. Meanwhile, K9 Nicky faces a race against time. A missing toddler has vanished somewhere in the vast outdoors with daylight fading fast.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When high-speed chases end in foot pursuits, the K9 takes over where engines can't; on Valentine's Day, K9 Igo shuts down a tense standoff before it explodes; K9 Duder teams up with a fellow K9 unit in a takedown that leaves a suspect nowhere to run; K9 Chase proves his name isn't just for show; and K9 Apollo sniffs out someone buried deep in thick brush within seconds.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: From tangled brush to pitch-black streets, these K9s sniff out danger with precision; after a tense pursuit, K9 Eddie corners a suspect hiding deep in a ravine; across the country, K9 Streeter makes a heart-stopping leap; K9 Riggs corners a double murder suspect; K9 Diesel kicks off his late-night shift by chasing down a hit-and-run perp.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: Fresh out of the academy, rookie K9 Carrier gets the call, but can he score his first apprehension?; in a pounding downpour, K9 Flash stays locked on the scent, tracking a suspect who bolted even after being tasered.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When officers issue that final K-9 warning, it's the last chance to back down - surrender or face the dog. K-9 Scout collides head-on with an armed suspect who refuses to back down and K-9 Vlad, "The Impaler," squares up with a defiant driver who won't follow commands. In the dead of night, K-9 Edge tracks down and takes down two fleeing suspected thieves and K-9 ZAM methodically tears through a vehicle search, uncovering a laundry list of charges.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When fleeing suspects put the public at risk, K9 teams race the clock to shut it down; K9 Haywire rolls in with SWAT, in search of a hit-and-run suspect who vanishes into a residential area; in a tense nighttime manhunt, K9s Ax and Endo step into the line of fire to shield their handlers; K9 Rico pulls double duty when a routine traffic stop erupts into chaos; under a blazing sun, K9 King battles the heat to stay on scent and close the gap.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When a suspect panics and runs, the dog smells it instantly; one bad decision leads to a very fast ending. K-9 Jax chases after a suspect accused of stealing a car; K-9 Bane helps bring a multi-state manhunt for one of Philadelphia's most wanted to a shocking end; after a funeral procession, K9 Timmy ends a tense standoff and K9 Jedi makes his handler into the happiest cop in the force.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When suspects make a run, K9 teams prove why the nose always knows; rookie K9 Duder gets thrown into the deep end when a high-speed chase explodes into a full-blown foot pursuit; after breaking into a store, a desperate suspect plays a dangerous game of hide-and-seek with K9 Ice; K9 Chico kicks into turbo mode, tracking down a fleeing suspect with a backpack stuffed with drugs; K9 Dobby sniffs out a woman accused of double murder.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: UFOs have been reported at the world's nuclear facilities ever since the first atomic bomb in 1945, with many suspecting that extraterrestrials are watching humanity's nuclear potential.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Tattoos, piercings, and body modification account for a nearly one-billion-dollar industry, but are these practices a bold form of self-expression or could they be motivated by a profound link to ancient ancestors.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Robots are being programmed to do everything from performing surgery on humans, to investigating other planets; humanoid robots are quickly reaching a level of sophistication that was thought to exist only in science fiction.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Stories of emperors, kings and pharaohs consulting a pantheon of nine gods are found in many cultures lending credence to the theory that there is an intergalactic council of nine working behind the scenes to monitor and guide humanity.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Ancient mythologies tell stories of humans being abducted by otherworldly beings, even as thousands of people continue to report being taken by aliens and then returned with implants and genetic mutations.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Researchers find that dozens of megalithic sites across the globe were designed to emanate the exact same frequency, causing them to speculate that certain frequencies may allow humans to connect with extraterrestrial forces.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Satellite images have revealed a giant face that appears to be carved into the Earth in Alberta, Canada, which has now become known far and wide as "The Badlands Guardian."

programme.title: Cortometrajes
programme.desc: Espacio para la emisión de producciones de corta duración.

programme.title: ¡Viva lo Imposible!
programme.desc: Una familia de funcionarios lleva una vida gris y monótona hasta que un día deciden rebelarse contra su destino.

programme.title: En septiembre
programme.desc: Ante el cierre definitivo de su colegio, nueve ex alumnos hacen un viaje en bicicleta por la sierra madrileña, lo que deriva en un mar de confesiones.

programme.title: Carreteras secundarias
programme.desc: La familia de Antonio es rica pero no quiere saber nada de él. Después de enviudar se quedó con Felipe, su hijo. Ahora el niño tiene quince años y los dos viajan de pueblo en pueblo viviendo de pequeñas trampas. Antonio les llama negocios y está convencido de que algún día se convertirá en millonario.

programme.title: La hora bruja
programme.desc: El nieto de una bruja gallega lleva su espectáculo de magia por todo el país junto con su amante a bordo de un autobús.

programme.title: El robobo de la jojoya
programme.desc: Unos ladrones intentan robar un diamante egipcio y una banda que se les adelanta les carga el asesinato de un guardia.

programme.title: Tiempo de Tormenta
programme.desc: Las vidas de un diseñador (Jorge Sanz) y la de un alcohólico coinciden después de que cada uno intenta suicidarse.

programme.title: El desencanto
programme.desc: El cineasta Jaime Chávarri entrevista a la esposa y a los tres hijos de un poeta español fallecido en 1962.

programme.title: Pudor
programme.desc: Existen secretos sobre obsesiones, miedos y deseos que no se dicen ni siquiera a los seres queridos. Son los miembros de una familia los que representan esa soledad que existe cuando se está en compañía.

programme.title: Bwana
programme.desc: Una xenofóbica familia española se van de vacaciones a una remota playa de la costa andaluza y se encuentran con un inmigrante africano ilegal que no sabe hablar español.

programme.title: A golpes
programme.desc: La historia de cinco chicas que aspiran a llevar una vida digna y decente en un barrio marginal de Madrid.

programme.title: El vientre de Juliette
programme.desc: Juliette, de 20 años, queda embarazada, pero no recibe ni el apoyo de su madre ni el de su novio. Mientras tanto, su hermana intenta encontrarle un esposo y apropiarse del bebé. Juliette se interesa entonces en la figura de su padre, de quien no sabe prácticamente nada.

programme.title: Miss Caribe
programme.desc: Alejandra recibe una extraña herencia tras la muerte de su padre: se convierte en propietaria de un barco que resulta ser un burdel flotante. Poco a poco, las relajadas costumbres del trópico cambiarán la mentalidad de Alejandra.

programme.title: La venganza de Don Mendo
programme.desc: El caballero castellano don Mendo Salazar, marqués de Cabra, se considera burlado cuando sabe que su novia, Magdalena, va a casarse con don Pero Collado, duque de Toro. A pesar de encontrarse encarcelado, él jura vengarse.

programme.title: El fantasma y Doña Juanita

programme.title: Gunnin' for That No. 1 Spot
programme.desc: Rucker Park in New York City's Harlem has been host to many legends, such as Wilt Chamberlain and Kareem Abdul-Jabbar. Now, the top high-school basketball players in America will assemble on the same court to compete in the first annual "Elite 24" all-star game, which is seen as a good measure of a player's NBA potential. This documentary trails eight of the teens as -- preparing to become champions -- they demonstrate the required dedication that accompanies a swift rise to greatness.

programme.title: Contemporary Color
programme.desc: The art of color guard is paired with contemporary musicians in this 2015 event staged by David Byrne at Brooklyn's Barclays Center. The color guard's synchronized dance is paired with performers including St. Vincent, Nelly Furtado and Ad-Rock.

programme.title: The Kill Team

programme.title: Midnight Traveler
programme.desc: Afghan director Hassan Fazili is forced to flee the country when the Taliban puts a bounty on his head.

programme.title: On Her Shoulders

programme.title: Meduza
programme.desc: When his hometown is invaded, a Ukrainian actor who once played a sniper in a movie becomes a real sniper on the front line.

programme.title: Night School
programme.desc: Indianapolis has one of the lowest high school graduation rates in the country. For adult learners Greg, Melissa, and Shynika, a high school diploma could be a life-changing achievement. The pursuit of their diplomas is fraught with the challenges of daily life and also the broader systemic roadblocks faced by many low-income Americans, including wages and working conditions.

programme.title: K2: The Impossible Descent
programme.desc: Following Andrzej Bargiel's expedition from Poland to Pakistan, and his descent from the summit of K2 on skis. On 22 July 2018, a Polish ski mountaineer gets into his bindings at 8,611m to make history.

programme.title: No Impact Man
programme.desc: This documentary tells the story of author Colin Beavan, who went completely "green," giving up virtually all of the comforts of modern living -- electricity, gas-powered transportation, shipped food and public waste disposal -- in a drastic effort to curb his environmental impact. The cameras capture the toll this well-intentioned, year-long project takes on Beavan's wife and baby daughter, as well as the ways it brings this family closer together.

programme.title: The Horn
programme.desc: Air Zermatt's teamwork is tested when a skier falls into the darkness of a 30-meter-deep glacial crevasse; the team must pull him out from the depths before the ice shifts and encases him in a frozen tomb.

programme.title: San Isidoro de Sevilla: Forjador de almas
programme.desc: Documental realizado con ocasión del 300 aniversario de su proclamación como Doctor de la Iglesia por el Papa Inocencio XIII el 25 de abril de 1722. Considerado como el último de los Padres de Occidente, ha pasado a la historia como el hombre más sabio de su tiempo, pero, ¿qué fue y qué hizo? Diversos expertos presentan su figura y la riqueza espiritual que dejó en herencia a través de su vida y escritos, a la vez que muestran cómo sigue siendo relevante para la lesa y los días de hoy.
